creator: cs@innolan.dk
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #2)

I tried to execute the mono disassembler. It should produce some intermediate language code (like a machine specific disassembler would do):

monodis Newtonsoft.Json.dll --output=Newtonsoft.Json.il
Segmentation fault (core dumped)

The monodis source code is c and browsing through the mono revisions reveal no changes in monodis source code since current ports version (4.2.3.4).
